folio.label: 104v
folio.l: And ©oure benigne fader , tenderly
Hatú don ©ow kepe , and in that same stounde
Al sodeynly , she fel a doun to grounde
¢ And in hire swougú , so sadly holdetú she
Hire children two , whan she gan he~ embrace
That witú gret sleigút , and gret difficulte
The children , from hire arm , they gonne race
O many a teere , many a pytous pace
Doun ran of hem , that stoden hire beside
Vnethe a boute hire , mygút they a byde
¢ Walter hire gladetú , and hire sorwe slaketú
She rysetú vp , a basshed , from hire traunce
And euäy wygút , hire ioye , and feste maketú
Til she hatú caugút , a geyn , hire countenaunce
Waltä hire dotú , so feithful plesaunce
That it was deynte , for to se the chere
Bytwen he~ two , syn they ben met in fere
¢ Theise ladyes , whan that they , here tyme sey
Han taken hire , and in to chaumbre gon
And stripen hire , out of hire rude aray
And in a clotú of gold , that brigút shon~
Witú a Corone , of many a riche stonö
Vp on hire hede , they in to halle hire brougút
And there she was honoured , as hire ougút
¢ Thus hatú this pytous day , a blisful ende
For euäy man & wo~man , dotú his mygút
This day , in myrthe and reuel , to spende
Til on the walkene , shon the sterres ligút
For more solempne , in euäy ma~nes sigút
This feste was , and grettere of costage
Than was the reuel , of hire mariage
¢ Ful many a ©ere , in heigú prosperitee
Lyuen theise two , in concord and in reest
And richely his dougúter , maryed he
Vn to a lord , oon of the worthiest
Of al Itayle , and thanne in pees and rest
His wyues fader , in his court he kepetú
Til that the soule , out of his body crepetú
¢ His sone succeditú , in his heritage
In reste and pees , after his faderes day
And fortunat was eke , in mariage
Al put he nat his wyf , in gret assay
This world is nat so strongö , it is no nay
As it hatú ben , in olde tymes ©ore
And herkenetú , what this Auctor , seitú therfore
